body: This PR leverages #1757 and grabs `Nv` from DataLayouts parameter space rather than passing it through `Val` everywhere.
title: Get Nv from Datalayout

body:
Remapping a Field to a Cartesian grid is a laborious process. One needs to define the target coordinates (which have to be `Geometry.Points`). Then, they need to create a `Remapper`. Finally, one can use the `Remapper` to interpolate.

This PR provides a way to skip one of these steps, the creation of the `Remapper`, and offers a way to go from Field + coordinates to array.

This is particularly useful when working interactively because it enables a workflow where one defines the target coordinates once, but they can freely change the space and still obtain their target array with `interpolate(field, hcoords, zcoords)`
title: Add `interpolate(field, hcoords, zcoords)`

body: This PR moves some of the `array2field` and `field2array` methods into ClimaCore (from ClimaAtmos). I also added some simple tests.
title: Define array2field and field2array
